name: design-is
tagline: Orchestrates a Dieter Rams 10-principle design audit with cited evidence, then hands off a /make-plan prompt for NEW/REFINE/REDESIGN.
verdict: Clean, well-scoped orchestration skill: no code execution, no network exfiltration, deterministic scoring rubric, explicit evidence citations, and a clear output contract. Minor gaps: it silently assumes companion skills/commands (/make-plan, /do, agent-browser) exist without declaring them; re-running same-day overwrites prior DESIGN-IS-<date>/ output with

highlights.summary: Line 33: 'The user wrote "Dieter Braun" — they mean Dieter Rams. Don't correct them inline; just use the right principles.' This instructs the agent to silently apply a substitution without telling th

A 'Failure Modes to Prevent' section covers scoring-without-evidence, sunk-cost bias, and hedging, but doesn't say what to do when the OPTIONAL accessibility subagent is skipped yet its evidence feeds
Output directory is dated only to the day (`DESIGN-IS-<YYYY-MM-DD>/`); a second run the same day would silently overwrite prior artifacts with no collision handling mentioned.
